creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, Jaap!

Thank you for the patch!

I tried to test it, but it seems that this patch brakes the TCL/TK detection
by ocaml's configure.  Can you take a look, please?
Here's the log:

Configuring LablTk...
tcl.h and tk.h version 8.5 found with "-I/usr/local/include/tcl8.5 -I/usr/local/include/tk8.5".
Tcl library not found.
Configuration failed, LablTk will not be built.

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
